reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku (not Tokyo), but tool fetched only Akita general spots. No sakura-specific filtering applied. Spots like Akita Castle, Lake Tazawa, and Omagari Fireworks appear; no explicit cherry blossom attribution. Tohoku has 6 prefectures; only Akita covered.
missing_data: Cherry blossom specific spots (sakura_meisho_100 kind) from Tohoku; coverage of Iwate, Yamagata, Fukushima, Miyagi, Aomori. Famous spots like Hirosaki, Kakunodate, Kitakami missing.
improvement_hint: Filter by kinds including sakura_meisho_100 and expand prefecture fanout to full Tohoku region (Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima) when query mentions Tohoku.

reasoning: Response uses get_local_specialty and returns 24 items including major Niigata sake brands (越の三梅, 越乃寒梅/Koshi no Kanbai, Hakkaisan, Kubota) from authoritative MAFF/Wikidata sources with English names, descriptions, QIDs, and source URLs. Strong coverage of the query intent.
missing_data: Physical brewery visit addresses or tasting room info; some items lack English descriptions (e.g. 越の三梅 has no name_en).
improvement_hint: Add brewery address/visit info where available and ensure all sake items have name_en populated for English-language queries.

reasoning: Query asks for ski resorts with hot springs (onsen) in Hakuba. Hakuba Happo-One ski resort correctly included. However no onsen spots returned; response includes unrelated items like UN Tourism award page, lake, art museum, botanical garden. No filtering for combined ski+onsen intent.
missing_data: Hakuba onsen facilities (Happo-One Onsen, Mimizuku no Yu, etc.); no onsen_ryokan from get_hotels called; ski resorts other than Happo-One (Goryu, Tsugaike, Norikura).
improvement_hint: When query combines two facility types (ski + onsen), call both get_spots and get_hotels; filter by kinds=ski_resort and lodging_type=onsen_ryokan in Hakuba municipality.

reasoning: Query asks for autumn foliage (koyo) in Kansai region, but tool only fetches Kyoto spots without foliage filtering. Results include Nijojo, Toji, Nagaoka-kyo — all valid Kyoto spots but none specifically flagged for autumn foliage. Kansai has 7 prefectures; only Kyoto covered.
missing_data: Spots tagged with koyo/momiji_meisho kinds; coverage of Osaka, Nara, Hyogo, Shiga, Mie, Wakayama for autumn foliage. Famous koyo spots like Daigo-ji, Tofuku-ji missing from visible results.
improvement_hint: Apply kinds filter for koyo/foliage-related tags and fan out across all Kansai prefectures; prioritize spots with autumn foliage season metadata when seasonal query detected.

reasoning: Query in Arabic asks for famous cherry blossom places in Kansai. Response retrieves Nara spots including Mount Yoshino (ranked #1 with sakura_meisho_100 kind, high prominence), which is Japan's most iconic sakura site. Kofuku-ji, Koriyama Castle also relevant. Good coverage of a key Kansai sakura destination.
missing_data: Coverage of other Kansai prefectures (Kyoto, Osaka) for cherry blossoms; Yoshino price/access info limited.
improvement_hint: Fan out to Kyoto and Osaka prefectures as well for a Kansai-wide sakura query; highlight sakura_meisho_100 tagged spots prominently.

reasoning: Query asks for stargazing spots on remote Okinawa islands. Response returns general Okinawa prefecture spots (Nakagusuku Castle, Tamaudun, Kumejima). Kumejima is relevant (remote island) but not tagged for stargazing. No dark_sky or astronomy-related kinds filtering applied. Most results are castles/historic sites unrelated to stars.
missing_data: Dark sky or astro-tourism tagged spots; specific islands known for stargazing (Iriomote, Taketomi, Yonaguni, Miyako); no dark_sky kind filtering applied.
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky kind to corpus; filter by island + low light pollution proxy; use municipality-level query targeting Yaeyama Islands or Miyako Islands for remote island stargazing.

reasoning: Thai query asks for rural Hokkaido onsen accommodation. Response returns confirmed onsen ryokan from Hito-yu-kai association including 知内温泉, 銀婚湯, 湯元凌雲閣, 湯元湧駒荘 — all genuinely rural Hokkaido hidden hot springs. Good match for rural onsen intent. Coordinates often null is a weakness.
missing_data: Coordinates for most hito_yu_kai entries; English/Thai names; booking URLs or access info beyond postal address.
improvement_hint: Enrich hito_yu_kai entries with geocoordinates and booking URLs; add English name translations for non-Japanese speakers querying rural onsen.

reasoning: Vietnamese query asks for Seto Inland Sea islands. Tool fetches Kagawa spots but returns mainland-focused spots (Ritsurin Garden, Mannō Lake, Marugame Castle) rather than islands like Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima. No island-specific filtering. Seto Inland Sea islands span multiple prefectures.
missing_data: Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima, Ōshima island spots; Hiroshima and Okayama prefecture spots for Seto island coverage; no island kind filtering.
improvement_hint: Add island kind filter and multi-prefecture fanout (Kagawa + Hiroshima + Okayama + Ehime) when query mentions Seto Inland Sea; prioritize entries with island kind tag.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Response returns 3 METI crafts: Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (indigo weaving), Otani Ware (ceramics), and Awa Washi (paper). Indigo weaving is relevant but no workshop/experience venue info provided. The craft data confirms indigo tradition but not where to do workshops.
missing_data: Actual workshop venues, studio addresses, booking info for hands-on indigo dyeing experiences; the core craft (阿波藍) itself is only partially represented through a related weaving product.
improvement_hint: Supplement METI craft data with municipal scrape venues tagged for craft workshops; add experience/workshop venue type to data model for craft-experience queries.

reasoning: German query asks for Buddhist temple lodgings (shukubo) on Mt. Koya. Response returns exactly that — confirmed shukubo from Koyasan Shukubo Association including Annyoin, Ichijoin, Ekoin, Kitamuroin with phone numbers, detailed Japanese descriptions of each temple's character. Excellent intent match.
missing_data: English name translations for shukubo entries; coordinates; website URLs for most entries (only source URL available).
improvement_hint: Add English descriptions and website URLs for Koyasan shukubo entries to better serve non-Japanese language queries like this German one.

reasoning: Query asks for off-the-beaten-path samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returns 153 matches with buke_yashiki kind. Includes Kakunodate samurai district (Akita, prominent, well-described), Matsue Buke Yashiki (Shimane), and Fukui entries — all genuinely outside Kyoto. Good geographic diversity.
missing_data: Kitsuki (Oita), Chiran (Kagoshima), Hagi (Yamaguchi) samurai districts; some entries lack English descriptions; coordinates null for some.
improvement_hint: Boost description_en completeness for buke_yashiki tagged entities; add Kitsuki, Chiran, Hagi entries to corpus if not present.

reasoning: Indonesian query asks for summer festivals in Akita. Response returns only 3 items from bunka_intangible — none are typical summer festivals. Akita's famous Kanto Festival and Omagari Fireworks (summer) are absent. Dainichido Bugaku is January; Kakunodate Festival is September; Tsuchizaki is July (relevant). Very sparse for summer festival intent.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Festival (August, major summer festival); Omagari Fireworks (August); summer-specific date filtering; scraped_schema_event entries for Akita summer events.
improvement_hint: Include scraped_schema_event items in get_festivals results and apply summer month filter (June-August) when seasonal context detected; Akita Kanto Festival must be in corpus.

reasoning: Korean query asks for small fishing port towns in San'in region. Tool returns Shimane general spots: Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan, Mt. Sanbe — none are fishing villages. No fishing port or coastal village filtering. Tottori (also San'in) not included. Saigo on Oki Islands, Yunotsu, Mihonoseki missing.
missing_data: Fishing village spots tagged with fishing_port or coastal kinds; San'in regional fanout to Tottori; specific fishing towns like Yunotsu, Oki Islands, Mihonoseki.
improvement_hint: Add fishing_port and fishing_village kind tags; implement San'in region fanout spanning Tottori + Shimane when region name detected in query.

reasoning: Query asks where to experience washi paper making in Gifu. Response returns 8 METI crafts including Mino Ware (ceramics), Hida Shunkei (lacquerware), Nagiso Rokuro Zaiku, Ichii Ittobori — only partially relevant. Mino Washi (美濃和紙) should be prominent. Craft designations present but no actual experience/workshop venues.
missing_data: 美濃和紙 (Mino Washi) is the specific answer sought — it should appear in results. Workshop venues, studio addresses for washi experience. Experience booking info.
improvement_hint: Ensure 美濃和紙 (Mino Washi) METI craft entry is in Gifu data; supplement with municipal scrape data for actual experience venues in Mino City and Yamato area.

reasoning: Spanish query asks for fishing villages on the Noto Peninsula. Tool fetches Ishikawa general spots returning Kanazawa Castle, Kenroku-en, Oyama Shrine — all Kanazawa city attractions, not Noto Peninsula fishing villages. No municipality-level filtering for Noto. Wajima, Suzu, Monzen fishing ports entirely absent.
missing_data: Noto Peninsula municipalities (Wajima, Suzu, Noto-cho, Anamizu); fishing village kind tags; Wajima morning market; Sosogi Coast; Shiroyone Senmaida rice terraces.
improvement_hint: When query mentions a specific sub-region (Noto Peninsula), resolve to relevant municipalities and call get_spots with municipality filter rather than whole prefecture; add fishing_village kind.

reasoning: Query asks for lesser-known sand dunes beyond Tottori. search_area returns 91 results with sand_dune kind including Fukiagehama (Kagoshima), Onjuku Beach (Chiba), Ishikari Dunes Museum (Hokkaido), Tottori (expected). Good geographic diversity beyond Tottori. Relevant lesser-known options surfaced.
missing_data: Sarobetsu sand dunes (Hokkaido), Nakatajima dunes (Hamamatsu), Uchimaru dunes; coordinates null for some entries.
improvement_hint: Add Nakatajima, Sarobetsu, and other documented sand dune entries; ensure coordinates are populated for all sand_dune tagged spots.

reasoning: Chinese query asks for traditional crafts in San'in region (Shimane). Response returns 4 METI crafts in Chinese: Iwami Yaki (ceramics), Sekishu Washi (paper, UNESCO), Unshuu Soroban (abacus), Izumo Stone Lantern — all authentic Shimane crafts with high-quality Chinese translations and source URLs.
missing_data: Tottori prefecture crafts (also San'in region); Inaba Washi; physical venue info for craft shops.
improvement_hint: Fan out to Tottori when San'in region query detected; add Tottori-specific crafts to ensure full San'in coverage in regional craft queries.

reasoning: Query asks for lavender fields in Hokkaido beyond Furano. Tool fetches general Hokkaido spots returning Showa-shinzan volcano, Sapporo Clock Tower, Matsumae Castle — none related to lavender. No lavender_field kind filtering. Kamifurano, Nakafurano, and other lavender farms outside Furano entirely absent.
missing_data: Lavender field spots beyond Furano: Kamifurano lavender parks, Nakafurano Flower Land, Hokuryu sunflower/lavender fields; lavender kind tag in corpus.
improvement_hint: Add lavender_field kind to corpus and tag relevant spots; implement kind-based filtering when flower tourism intent is detected; include Kamifurano and Nakafurano municipality queries.

reasoning: Filipino query asks for traditional towns in Kyushu (likely historical townscapes, not 'coffee towns'). Tool fetches Oita spots: Usuki Castle, Usa Jingū, Oka Castle — not traditional merchant/post towns. Query may mean 古い町並み. No jokamachi or preservation_district filtering applied; Oita alone covers only part of Kyushu.
missing_data: Traditional townscape spots (jokamachi/preservation_district kinds) across Kyushu: Yanagawa, Yatsushiro, Hita, Chiran; multi-prefecture Kyushu fanout.
improvement_hint: When traditional townscape query detected, filter by kinds=jokamachi,preservation_district and fan out to all Kyushu prefectures; Oita alone is insufficient for a Kyushu-wide query.

reasoning: Japanese query asks for stayable traditional farmhouses (kominka) in Hokuriku region. Tool fetches Ishikawa hotels returning onsen ryokan (hito_yu_kai), a student housing entry, and AB Hotel — no kominka lodging at all. Query specifies Hokuriku (Ishikawa + Toyama + Fukui + Niigata); only Ishikawa covered. No kominka lodging type in data.
missing_data: Kominka-type accommodation entries for Hokuriku; Toyama/Fukui/Niigata coverage; kominka lodging type in hotel data model.
wrong_data: Student housing (name_en: 'Student housing 1') is inappropriate noise in a travel accommodation query.
improvement_hint: Add kominka lodging_type to hotel data model; source kominka stay listings from official registries; filter out student housing from travel accommodation results.

reasoning: Query asks for mountain shrines in the Kii Peninsula. get_japan_heritage returns excellent results: Kongōbu-ji (Mt. Koya), Kumano Kodō (pilgrimage routes), Kumano Sanzan (three grand shrines) — all UNESCO WHS and perfectly matching mountain shrine intent. Tool scope note correctly advises on UNESCO vs Japan Heritage distinction.
missing_data: Yoshino-Ōmine area shrine coverage; individual Kumano Sanzan shrines (Hongu Taisha, Nachi Taisha, Hayatama Taisha) as separate entities with addresses.
improvement_hint: Link individual Kumano shrine entities with coordinates and opening hours; add Yoshino-Ōmine as separate heritage entry for mountain worship route completeness.

reasoning: Query asks for summer fireworks festivals along Sea of Japan coast. Tool returns 129 Niigata festivals with Nagaoka Fireworks correctly appearing (third result). However first two results are spring flower festivals (芝桜まつり, ヒメサユリ祭り) not fireworks. Key response (Nagaoka) is buried under non-fireworks content. Sea of Japan coastal coverage beyond Niigata absent.
missing_data: Fireworks events from other Sea of Japan coastal prefectures (Akita, Ishikawa, Fukui, Toyama, Yamagata); better hanabi-specific ranking.
improvement_hint: Apply hanabi/fireworks kind filter or keyword filter when fireworks intent detected; rank hanabi tagged events above general flower festivals; fan out to multiple Sea of Japan prefectures.

reasoning: Query asks for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Response returns 2 METI items: Hakata Ori weaving (multi-prefecture including Oita) and Beppu Bamboo Crafts (別府竹細工) — the latter is exactly the right answer with excellent English description, production area, and source URL. Core bamboo craft is correctly surfaced.
missing_data: Workshop venues for Beppu bamboo crafts; museum/gallery entries for experiencing bamboo craft in Beppu; physical address for craft centers.
improvement_hint: Supplement craft data with see_also museum/experience venue for Beppu bamboo craft (Beppu Traditional Bamboo Crafts Museum); add craft experience venue type.

reasoning: Query asks for cycling routes in rural Shikoku. Ōmishima (tagged cycling_route, walking_road_500) correctly appears. However coverage is sparse: only one cycling-specific spot visible. Ehime alone covers part of Shikoku; Shimanami Kaidō (the premier cycling route) context is present via Ōmishima but not fully surfaced.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaidō route entries; cycling routes in Kochi, Tokushima, Kagawa; dedicated cycling route kind entries for rural areas of all four Shikoku prefectures.
improvement_hint: Fan out cycling query to all 4 Shikoku prefectures; filter by cycling_route kind; add dedicated Shimanami Kaidō entry with full route description and access info.

reasoning: Query asks where to see kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. get_traditional_arts returns UNESCO ICH including Kabuki (correctly) and Bunraku. However results are art forms listed without venue information — no specific regional kabuki theaters (Kompira Grand Theater in Kagawa, Uchiko-za in Ehime, Chichibu Yomatsuri) surfaced. Cannot answer 'where' question from this data.
missing_data: Specific kabuki venue locations: Kompira Grand Theater (Kotohira, Kagawa), Uchiko-za (Uchiko, Ehime), regional kabuki stages with addresses and performance schedules.
improvement_hint: Add kabuki_theater kind to spot corpus and tag regional historic theaters; link get_traditional_arts kabuki entry to venue spots; a 'where to see' query requires venue data not just art form classification.
